title: Cortex Chess
description: A from-scratch chess engine AND analysis studio in TypeScript — PVS search with transposition tables, SEE, quiescence, null-move + late-move reductions, internal iterative reduction, countermoves and a tapered eval. Endgames are solved exactly in the browser by retrograde analysis: KPK/KRK/KQK plus the full King+Bishop+Knight vs King distance-to-mate table (~33.6M positions, the hardest elementary mate, built and exhaustively self-verified in seconds). Play with adjustable strength, fixed movetime and real pondering (instant ponder-hits); open the Analyze board to import a PGN, step through with a multi-PV engine, a whole-game evaluation graph, an opening explorer and one-click annotated-PGN export; or hit the Engine Lab to run perft, tactics, the Bratko-Kopec / Win-at-Chess EPD benchmark suites, and the tablebase verifier.
